tasks.title: Create Study Planner feature in src/features/planner/Planner.tsx with calendar and schedule generation
tasks.description: Implement study planner allowing users to create daily, weekly, and monthly plans with custom IELTS target band and exam date. Auto-generate study schedule based on target band and available time. Provide calendar-style view with progress tracking and missed-task handling. Use React state management and IndexedDB for persistence. Include forms with validation using React Hook Form and Zod.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create and edit study plans with validation
Auto-generated schedules reflect target band and time
Calendar view shows tasks and progress
Missed tasks are highlighted and manageable
tasks.expectedResult: Fully functional study planner with scheduling and calendar UI

outputPlan.description: Study planner main component with forms and calendar
Calendar component showing study tasks and progress

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables users to plan and track their IELTS study schedule effectively

Integrate AI-generated example sentences using user-provided API key stored locally. Use IndexedDB for data persistence and React Hook Form for input validation.

tasks.title: Implement AI Tutor Integration in src/services/ai/AIService.ts and src/features/settings/AISettings.tsx
tasks.description: Create AI service module supporting user-provided API keys stored securely in browser localStorage or IndexedDB. Provide functions for generating study plans, vocabulary examples, reading passages, writing checks, speaking questions, grammar explanations, mistake explanations, and daily learning content. Implement Settings UI for user to enter and test API key, toggle AI features on/off, and show clear warnings about local storage of keys.
